project: Please Note: There will be a delay (about 2-5 seconds) upon game level load. If it does not load within 10 seconds, switch to a different tab (if playing HTML) or switch to a different app. Then switch back to the game. DO NOT CLOSE THE GAME AS THIS WILL DELETE YOUR PROGRESS.
Please Note: Not all levels are completed. Current development stage is Full Release (v1.0.64.14).

Left/Right (A/D): Movement
Down/S: Fall through Platform
Up/Space/W: Jump
Requesting Keyboard Lock may show a notification. Keyboard lock ONLY PREVENTS KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS AND WORKS ONLY IN FULLSCREEN.
Please Note: Gamepad Buttons X/Y and A/B are switched if using Xbox controller. Not for Nintendo Pro Controller.

to gaze upon the necro is to stare a second too late
???: "This is a Spirit Orb.... It is one of the more common enemies... Be careful... You must defeat every enemy to proceed..."
???: "A Necromancer has appeared!! Be careful! It can attack from a far! Take this powerups!"
???: "A portal... How strange... Proceed with caution. I sense an evil presence and dark magicks radiating from within the portal..."
???: "This is a Skill Power. Collect this."

Tutorial Voice: "Use W/Space to jump. Use A/D to move left/right. Use 1 and 2 to select your magic attack type, 3 and 4 to select your melee. Use Q or LMB to Magic Attack. Use RMB to Melee Attack. MMB to fire an Arrow. To review controls info, hold P. Hold E to view your inventory, and R to interact with inventory."
???: "This are pass-through platforms. Jump to get through them."
You need to wait for cooldown!
